reasoning: Silhouette is a clean rounded square — instantly readable as a button at 1x. Pixel art style carries warmth and game personality (sandy tones, colorful accent icons, gold trim). On dark bg contrast is solid and the design pops well. However: (1) on light/white bg the beige body blends — only dark outlines and accent colors save it, leaving insufficient contrast margin. (2) At 1x, all interior iconography collapses to indistinct colored noise — the design relies on detail that vanishes at small sizes. (3) The interior is packed and busy rather than simply charming; feels more like a HUD panel than a friendly toy button, so the 'sticker test' reads as 'game inventory panel' rather than an immediately lovable character. Silhouette clarity passes, charm is present but diluted by complexity, light-bg contrast is borderline. Marginal overall.
